calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda S. Forster, 13286.

Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Tenderloin Heath.
Lolitta Angeles, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Lisa Elarms, Front Desk Clerk for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Jonathan Betts.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 6, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---CCSF Uniform Hotel Visitor Policy, dated 07/11/06------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Perform or Quit, dated 04/22/08----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Aranda Residence Overnight Sign In/Out Log-------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Three (3) Day Notice to Terminate Tenancy--------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Tenderloin Health, and against defendant Jonathan Betts as follows:

Plaintiff Tenderloin Health shall recover from defendant Jonathan Betts Costs in the amount of $195.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $195.00.

Plaintiff Tenderloin Health is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 64 Turk Street, #107, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, JUN-18-2008: ARNOLD WALTER EVJE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF;
